sentences.arabic: يُعَرِّفُ شَيْخُ الْإِسْلَامِ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ الْعِبَادَةَ بِأَنَّهَا اسْمٌ جَامِعٌ لِكُلِّ مَا يُحِبُّهُ اللهُ وَيَرْضَاهُ مِنَ الْأَقْوَالِ وَالْأَعْمَالِ الظَّاهِرَةِ وَالْبَاطِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Šejhul-islam Ibn Tejmmije definiše ibadet kao sveobuhvatan naziv za sve ono što Allah voli i čime je zadovoljan, bilo da se radi o riječima ili djelima, vidljivim ili nevidljivim.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah defines worship as a comprehensive term for everything that Allah loves and is pleased with, including words and actions, both outward and inward.

sentences.arabic: وَهَذَا التَّعْرِيفُ الشَّامِلُ يَقْتَضِي أَنْ يَكُونَ التَّوْحِيدُ هُوَ الْأَسَاسَ الَّذِي تُبْنَى عَلَيْهِ جَمِيعُ التَّصَرُّفَاتِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ، سَوَاءٌ كَانَتْ شَعَائِرَ تَعَبُّدِيَّةً أَوْ مُعَامَلَاتٍ حَيَاتِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Ova sveobuhvatna definicija zahtijeva da Tevhid (monoteizam) bude temelj na kojem se grade svi ljudski postupci, bilo da su to obredni činovi ili svakodnevne transakcije.
sentences.translationEn: This inclusive definition requires that Tawhid (monotheism) be the foundation upon which all human actions are built, whether they are ritual acts of worship or life transactions.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُسْلِمُ الَّذِي يُفْرِدُ اللهَ بِالْخَوْفِ وَالرَّجَاءِ وَالْمَحَبَّةِ، يَتَحَرَّرُ مِنْ عُبُودِيَّةِ الْمَخْلُوقِينَ وَيَرْتَقِي إِلَى مَقَامِ الْعُبُودِيَّةِ الْحَقَّةِ لِلَّهِ وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Musliman koji izdvaja Allaha u strahu, nadi i ljubavi, oslobađa se ropstva stvorenjima i uzdiže se na stepen istinskog robovanja isključivo Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim who singles out Allah in fear, hope, and love becomes free from servitude to created beings and rises to the station of true servitude to Allah alone.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ هُنَا، يَتَبَيَّنُ أَنَّ حَقَّ اللهِ عَلَى الْعِبَادِ هُوَ أَنْ يَعْبُدُوهُ وَلَا يُشْرِكُوا بِهِ شَيْئًا، كَمَا وَرَدَ فِي حَدِيثِ مُعَاذِ بْنِ جَبَلٍ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Odavde postaje jasno da je Allahovo pravo kod robova da Ga obožavaju i da Mu ništa ne pridružuju, kao što je navedeno u hadisu Muaza ibn Džebela, radijallahu anhu.
sentences.translationEn: From this, it becomes clear that Allah's right over His servants is that they worship Him and associate nothing with Him, as mentioned in the hadith of Mu'adh ibn Jabal, may Allah be pleased with him.

sentences.translation: [Zabilježio Buhari u Knjizi o džihadu i pohodima].
sentences.translationEn: [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Jihad and Expeditions].

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَحْقِيقَ هَذَا التَّوْحِيدِ يَسْتَلْزِمُ نَفْيَ الشَّرِيكِ فِي الرُّبُوبِيَّةِ وَالْأُلُوهِيَّةِ وَالْأَسْمَاءِ وَالصِّفَاتِ، مِمَّا يُؤَدِّي إِلَى طُمَأْنِينَةِ النَّفْسِ وَاسْتِقَامَةِ السُّلُوكِ.
sentences.translation: Ostvarivanje ovog Tevhida zahtijeva negiranje sudruga u Gospodarstvu, Božanstvenosti, te Imenima i Svojstvima, što vodi ka smiraju duše i ispravnosti ponašanja.
sentences.translationEn: Achieving this Tawhid necessitates denying any partner in Lordship, Divinity, and Names and Attributes, leading to tranquility of the soul and uprightness of behavior.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي النِّهَايَةِ، فَإِنَّ الْعِبَادَةَ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ طُقُوسٍ جَامِدَةٍ، بَلْ هِيَ مَنْهَجُ حَيَاةٍ مُتَكَامِلٍ يَرْبِطُ الْعَبْدَ بِخَالِقِهِ فِي كُلِّ حِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, ibadet nisu samo kruti rituali, već cjelovit način života koji povezuje roba sa njegovim Stvoriteljem u svakom trenutku.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, worship is not merely rigid rituals, but a complete way of life that connects the servant to their Creator at all times.

sentences.arabic: فَلْنَحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعَلُّمِ الْعَقِيدَةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ لِنَعْبُدَ اللهَ عَلَى بَصِيرَةٍ وَهُدًى.
sentences.translation: Zato se trudimo da naučimo ispravnu akidu kako bismo obožavali Allaha sa znanjem i uputom.
sentences.translationEn: Let us be keen on learning the correct creed to worship Allah with insight and guidance.
